channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: forrestchang / andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 42,753 → 44,768 (+2015) | Ranked #1
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. 9,646 stars today

item.title: pascalorg / editor
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 12,610 → 12,850 (+240) | Ranked #2
Create and share 3D architectural projects.
Language: TypeScript 1,391 stars today

item.title: thedotmack / claude-mem
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 57,760 → 58,217 (+457) | Ranked #3
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
Language: TypeScript 2,305 stars today

item.title: Lordog / dive-into-llms
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 29,369 → 29,900 (+531) | Ranked #4
《动手学大模型Dive into LLMs》系列编程实践教程
Language: Jupyter Notebook 941 stars today

item.title: Donchitos / Claude-Code-Game-Studios
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 10,379 → 10,802 (+423) | Ranked #13

Language: Shell 612 stars today
